description: AI-generated raster assets accepted into NebulaLance. Every file has a .provenance.json sidecar (provider, model, prompt, seed, request id). 3D models (OBJ + baked diffuse), SFX, music, and the intro video carry provenance sidecars too but are outside this raster manifest's scope.

integration.role: menu backdrop poster behind the looping intro video, object-fit cover
parallax deep-space backdrop quad behind the play plane
